output_constraints.featured_items_count: items[] must contain 1 to 3 entries with tier == 'featured'
output_constraints.full_treatment_required: items with tier 'featured' or 'queued' must have research.full_treatment != null
output_constraints.raw_context_required: every item must have at least one chunk in research.raw_context
output_constraints.claim_item_ids_valid: every claim.item_id must match an id in items[]
output_constraints.source_ids_valid: every source_id reference in claims and raw_context must match an id in sources[]
output_constraints.verbatim_at_fetch_time: sources[].retrieved_text_or_snapshot must be captured at fetch time, not at artifact assembly

l2DistrictType.description: L2 voter file column name for the official's district (e.g. City_Ward). Omit for at-large city-wide officials — Haystaq will use city scope only.

l2DistrictName.description: L2 district value to match (e.g. FAYETTEVILLE CITY WARD 2). Omit for at-large city-wide officials.

officialName.description: Full name of the elected official receiving the briefing.

agendaPacketUrl.description: Permanent URL to the agenda packet PDF. Used as the stable citation URL — never replaced with a presigned fetch URL.

campaignUrl.description: Optional campaign website URL for the elected official.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the briefing was generated.

official_name.description: Name of the elected official. Copied exactly from PARAMS.

meeting_date.description: Date of the council meeting (YYYY-MM-DD). Copied exactly from PARAMS.

estimated_read_minutes.description: Estimated read time in minutes for featured items only.

agenda_packet_url.description: Permanent agendaPacketUrl from PARAMS. Never a presigned fetch URL.

source_bundle_retrieved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the last source was fetched.

briefing_version.description: Version tag from the instruction header (e.g. v2).

items.description: All agenda items in a single array. tier determines display depth and research depth. featured = top 3 shown in UI with full treatment. queued = vote-required but not in top 3; full treatment available in research layer for chatbot. standard = procedural or low-priority; one-sentence summary only.

id.description: Stable item identifier for cross-referencing from claims and raw_context chunks (e.g. 'item_005').

item_number.description: Agenda item number as it appears in the packet (e.g. '5F', '6D', '1'). Always a string.

title.description: Agenda item title copied exactly from the packet.

tier.description: featured: shown in top-3 UI display. queued: full treatment in research layer, not shown in top 3. standard: one-sentence summary only.

vote_required.description: True if this item requires a council vote.

tier_reason.description: Reasons driving this item's tier assignment.

display.description: Fields consumed by the UI. Standard items have summary only. Featured and queued items populate all applicable fields.

summary.description: For featured/queued: what is actually at stake (full overview). For standard: one sentence describing the item and what the official should expect.

constituent_sentiment.description: Featured and queued only. Null if no relevant Haystaq column or haystaq_status != ok.

summary.description: Prose display string using citywide figure. E.g. 'Citywide modeled support on this measure is estimated at 72 on a 0-100 scale.' Not a percentage split.

detail.description: One sentence describing what the score means for this jurisdiction as a modeled estimate. Must disclose it is a modeled estimate, not a direct survey result.

district_note.description: Null if district and city are closely aligned. Set when district meaningfully departs from city, e.g. 'District-level modeled sentiment on this measure is above the citywide estimate.'

support_pct.description: Citywide mean score for the chosen hs_* column (0-100 scale), representing the primary support or main-direction figure per score_high_means.

oppose_pct.description: Null unless a true complementary hs_* field was also queried. Do not compute as 100 minus support_pct.

voter_count.description: Active voters in the citywide scope used as the denominator.

recent_news.description: Featured and queued only. Up to 3 curated headlines for UI display. Full article text is in research.full_treatment.news_articles.

publication_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Null if exact date could not be confirmed.

budget_impact.description: Featured and queued only. Null if no figures available. Do not estimate.

summary.description: Plain-language cost summary extracted from source.

value.description: Dollar amount copied exactly from source.

key_observations.description: Featured and queued only. Synthesized observations, each one or two sentences.

source_ids.description: References to top-level sources[] entries for UI inline citation display.

research.description: Deep content layer for the chatbot and QA. Not stripped by gp-api.

raw_context.description: Agenda PDF chunks for this item. Each chunk carries redundant item metadata so it is self-contained when retrieved in isolation by a pre-indexing service.

item_id.description: Parent item id — redundant by design for standalone retrieval.

item_title.description: Parent item title — redundant by design for standalone retrieval.

tier.description: Parent item tier — redundant by design for standalone retrieval.

source_id.description: Reference to sources[] entry for this chunk's source document.

text.description: Verbatim extracted text for this chunk.

full_treatment.description: Present for featured and queued items; null for standard items.

haystaq_detail.description: Null if no relevant Haystaq column found. Present with status field even on city_mismatch.

city_mean_score.description: AVG of chosen hs_* column across all active voters citywide. Primary figure for display.constituent_sentiment.

district_mean_score.description: AVG of chosen hs_* column across active voters in the official's district. Surfaced in district_note when meaningfully different from city.

city_voter_count.description: COUNT of active voters in the citywide scope.

district_voter_count.description: COUNT of active voters in the district scope.

news_articles.description: Full fetched content for each article. Null if no news found.

body_text.description: Full article body from pmf_runtime.http.get(). Empty string if paywalled — do not omit.

budget_detail.description: Null if no budget figures found.

verbatim_extract.description: Exact text from the source document containing this figure.

claims.description: Every factual claim in the briefing. QA uses this to verify support before release. Stripped from the UI display API response.

item_id.description: Must match an id in items[].

claim_text.description: Verbatim text as it appears in the briefing.

claim_weight.description: Assigned via the claim weight table in instruction.md. Not LLM-inferred.

source_extracts.description: Verbatim passages from sources that support this claim.

source_ids.description: References to id values in sources[].

sources.description: Full bibliography. retrieved_text_or_snapshot must be set at fetch time. Chatbot draws from this field. UI strips retrieved_text_or_snapshot from the display API response.

id.description: Unique identifier for cross-referencing from claims[] and raw_context chunks.

name.description: Descriptive title of the source document or page.

url.description: Permanent stable URL. Null for Haystaq (no public URL) and for agenda packet entries where run_metadata.agenda_packet_url is the canonical reference.

retrieved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp set at fetch time, not at assembly.

retrieved_text_or_snapshot.description: Verbatim text captured at retrieval time. QA and chatbot both depend on this field.

haystaq_column.description: The hs_* column queried. Haystaq sources only.

score_value.description: Raw mean score from the query. Haystaq sources only.

district_voters_n.description: Active voter count from the query. Haystaq sources only.

disclosure.description: Required AI-assistance disclaimer. Must match verbatim text in instruction.md.
